title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a memory layer that persists context across multiple AI agents and tools. It stores encrypted memories owned by the user that can be recalled by different AI providers like Claude and Pi without cross-provider visibility.
